meaning: n.(旧时人们人们认为存在于可燃物中的)燃素,热素
examples: All flammable materials contain phlogiston that is liberated in burning, leaving the "dephlogisticated" substance in its "true" calx form.
A thing was inflammable if it contained phlogiston.
As has been mentioned, some postulated that phlogiston has negative weight (levity).
As Eichengreen nicely noted, the gold standard is not phlogiston.
